name: Ironwood Frontier
summary: Fabric 1.20.1 cozy frontier survival and settlement: scenic terrain, villages, light ruins, wildlife, ambience, farmhouse building palettes, Farmer's Delight cooking, measured travel maps and waystones, Tom's Storage and backpacks, light Create mills and workshops—the wild slowly becomes home.

notes: Curated frontier homestead vibe: optional Presence Footsteps and More Delight may be dropped if runtime stabilization requires it; Croptopia omitted here because base Croptopia is not Modrinth-resolvable under MythWeaver naming and CurseForge API returned HTTP 403 in automation; no Inventory Profiles Next; Create Fabric kept decorative and light.
